title: erigeron leiolepis
intro: Erigeron leiolepis, also known as the Himalayan fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Erigeron leiolepis include reducing inflammation, treating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies to treat a range of ailments.
